domain_archetypes.name: semantic evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: semantic signal changes while layer context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: layer boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: layer handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: agents regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: agents behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: product operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: product output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
